Appearances:
Plaintiff Parkmerced Investors Properties LLC is present. Represented by Donna Stern.
Attorney Marina Franco for the plaintiff.
Defendant Erin Malcolm is present.
Attorney Angela Briggs appearing for defendant in limited scope.

The Judge Pro Tem Neil Bardack, litigants and counsel confer in Dept. 504A, for settlement discussions. This case did NOT settle. The trial date of MAY-20-2013 remains on calendar. (501/JPT)
